action.reasoning: Observation: test_predict.py succeeded, rendering 11 views from one val object. Pipeline confirmed. Analysis: Baseline TripoSR should give initial LPIPS score; we need to measure it and iteration time (eval runtime). Decision: Submit eval with pretrained checkpoints/triposr to get baseline LPIPS and evaluate performance. Then plan improvements based on score.
